---
title: "Projects"
format: html
---

# 📊 My Projects

This section showcases my work in data science, simulation, and object-oriented programming.

---

## 🦠 SIR Epidemic Model

Agent-based simulation of disease spread using OOP principles.

- Models infection and recovery dynamics  
- Implements modular design (Simulator + Visualizer)  
- Demonstrates epidemic peak and stabilization  

👉 [Open Project](sir_model/sir.qmd)

---

## 🧪 SEIR Epidemic Model

Extension of the SIR model including an **Exposed (latent)** state.

- More realistic epidemic dynamics  
- Additional compartment (E) for incubation  
- Built using reusable OOP structure  

- [Open Project](seir_model/seir.qmd)

## 📊 Energy Data Analysis

- [Open Project](data_analysis/analysis.qmd)

## Machine Learning project on Ocean analysis

- [Open Project](ml_report_ocean/ml_report.qmd)
